verdict: PASS — production calendar integration is safe and functional

production_calendar_safety.detail: Closed days produce calendar_skip with zero events written. Verified with 2026-12-25 (Christmas) and 2026-06-27 (weekend).

open_day_event_chain.detail: Trading day (2026-06-24) writes full chain: atomic_request.v1, run_context.v1, strategy_dispatch.v1, draft_candidates.v1. run_context carries calendar_source=production_calendar with pmc- version.

execution_guard_intact.detail: M4e did not modify execution_guard.py. Real buy without approval still blocked (block_code: market_mismatch). Broker injection attempts are audited.

backward_compatibility.detail: dry_run_fixture and manual_pilot_override paths unchanged. manual_pilot_override still requires --calendar-override-reason. Warnings include 'not_production_calendar' for non-production sources.

idempotency.detail: Repeated discovery with same idempotency_key on production_calendar path returns idempotent_replay=true.

test_coverage.detail: 16/16 tests pass. Covers calendar version, CN/HK/US trading days, holidays, weekends, Thanksgiving, closed-day skip, open-day event chain, idempotency, backward compat, three-market parallel.

cron_readiness_gate.detail: All 6 checks pass: event_root, registry_policy, cli_allowlist, production_calendar_integration, validation_gate, dry_run_smoke.

data_source_reliability.detail: pandas-market-calendars v5.4.0 is a mature open-source library. Covers XSHG (SSE), XHKG (HKEX), NYSE/NASDAQ. Uses exchange-published holiday schedules. Updated annually.

minor_issues.description: Half-day detection uses cal.early_closes() which may not cover all special half-day sessions for HK market (typhoon recoveries are not in the calendar).
minor_issues.recommendation: Document that台风/黑雨临时休市 is out of scope for any calendar source; operator notification route handles those edge cases.

minor_issues.description: venv is project-local (.venv/). Production deployment needs to ensure pandas-market-calendars is available in the runtime environment.
minor_issues.recommendation: Add to DEPENDENCIES.md or create requirements.txt for the stock-picking project.

conclusion: M4e successfully integrates pandas-market-calendars as the production calendar source. The hard-reject is replaced with real exchange-calendar queries. Closed days safely skip without writing events. Open days proceed through the full discovery chain. Execution guard, backward compatibility, and idempotency are all verified. Ready for production cron scheduling pending operator notification route configuration.
